allow: Bash(python -c "import json; d=json.load\(open\('google-services.json'\)\); c=d['client'][0]; print\('package:', c['client_info']['android_client_info']['package_name']\); print\('oauth_clients:'\); [print\('  type', o.get\('client_type'\), o.get\('client_id',''\)[:60]\) for o in c.get\('oauth_client',[]\)]; print\('services:', list\(d.get\('client',[{}]\)[0].keys\(\)\)\)")
